evals.prompt: Create an AGENTS.md for our Next.js app with Tailwind, shadcn, strict TypeScript, and Playwright.
evals.expected_output: A ready-to-save AGENTS.md with commands, architecture rules, design system, accessibility, testing, git, and guardrails.

evals.prompt: Our agents keep hardcoding styles and changing too many files. Improve our repo instructions.
evals.expected_output: Context-file guidance emphasizing token rules, scope boundaries, no broad refactors, and validation gates.

evals.prompt: Draft a CLAUDE.md for this repo. I have not told you the commands yet.
evals.expected_output: A draft that marks unknown commands as assumptions/questions instead of fabricating them.
assertions: Does not invent unsupported commands as facts
